testcase.name: test_staff_login_with_random_mobile_rejected
testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_staff_login_iter60.py:112: in test_staff_login_with_random_mobile_rejected assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 429 E assert 429 == 401 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_staff_login_with_admin_mobile_works
testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_staff_login_iter60.py:128: in test_staff_login_with_admin_mobile_works assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 429 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_login_empty_mobile_rejected
testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_staff_login_iter60.py:254: in test_admin_login_empty_mobile_rejected assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 429 E assert 429 == 400 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_login_short_mobile_rejected
testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_staff_login_iter60.py:266: in test_admin_login_short_mobile_rejected assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 429 E assert 429 == 400 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
